data_source: backtest_100d.csv (n=589, BTC/HYPE/SOL) — trades.csv FILE MISSING (bot offline Day 69.25)
dataset_note: Run 116 uses backtest_100d.csv (n=589) — Run 115 used trades_10d.csv (n=965). Different dataset, different metrics.

avg_slippage.reason: No live trades. snapshot_entry column absent in backtest CSV. Cannot compute slippage without actual fill vs expected price.

sl_analysis.note: BELOW BREAKEVEN. 100d dataset: 44.5% WR vs 57% in 10d. Includes older pre-optimization trades. Payoff ratio 0.930 is better than 10d's 0.686 — TP sizing improved but WR collapsed.

10d_vs_100d_comparison.explanation: 100d includes older pre-rule-optimization trades. Recent rules (vetos, floor raises) should improve WR on fresh data.

HYPE.note: Primary loss source despite higher WR — asymmetric SL/TP sizes

known_noise_patterns: BTC stop width <0.86% avg too tight — 66.4% noise rate from 10d analysis
Illiquid regime: 71.9% noise-stop rate confirmed (57 trades, 10d)
91.2% of 100d trades have duration_h=0.0 — HoldTimeRuleManager blind

fill_rate.reason: Bot offline — no live order flow

duration_analysis.root_cause: backtest/engine.py ~line 2522-2540: hold_s = meta.get('hold_time_s') returns 0. Fallback reads entry_reasons.get('sim_time') and meta.get('close_sim_time') — both None in 100d dataset.
duration_analysis.impact: HoldTimeRuleManager completely neutered — cannot enforce minimum hold times or learn regime-specific patterns

confidence_bin_forensics_100d.note: CRITICAL FINDING: Higher confidence correlates with LOWER WR in 100d data — inverse confidence paradox

80_90_pct.flag: WORST BAND — confidence inversely predicts outcome

delta_from_run115.dataset_change: Run 115 used trades_10d.csv (n=965); Run 116 uses backtest_100d.csv (n=589)
delta_from_run115.wr_delta: -12.5 pts (57.0% -> 44.5%) due to older pre-optimization data in 100d
delta_from_run115.payoff_ratio_delta: +0.244 (0.686 -> 0.930) — better average trade sizing in 100d data
new_findings: Confidence inversion confirmed at 100d scale: 80-90% conf = 40% WR (WORST band)
HYPE SHORT 75-85% danger zone: 33% WR, -$4155 on 40 trades — validates hype_short_veto_v1
SOL SHORT best single trade: +$713 (SOL SHORT entry 130.75 conf 79.7%)
TRAILING_STOP exits: 47.7% WR (neutral) — not a primary loss source
